methods.name: TrimEnd
methods.summary: Trim the line at the end
methods.remarks: Trim the line at the end

params.name: ds
params.doc: The length by which the line will be trimmed. Negative value extends the line.

throws.when: When the ds length is larger than the line's length.

methods.name: TrimStart
methods.summary: Trim the line at the start
methods.remarks: Trim the line at the start

params.name: ds
params.doc: The length by which the line will be trimmed. Negative value extends the line.

throws.when: When the ds length is larger than the line's length.

methods.name: __eq__
methods.summary: Comparison of lines without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!
methods.remarks: Comparison of lines without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!

returns.doc: True when lines are equal, otherwise false.
